title: MCP Server stops after first trigger
symptom: The MCP Server workflow stops executing after the first trigger, requiring manual intervention to restart it.
applies_when: Using MCP Server with test URL
root_cause: The issue arises when using the test URL for the MCP Server, which is designed for manual execution only. This URL does not maintain an active state after the first trigger, leading to the workflow stopping.
fix_steps: Switch from the test URL to the production URL for the MCP Server
Test the workflow to confirm it triggers automatically
agent_instruction: Use the production URL for the MCP Server to ensure it triggers automatically.
